sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17284" key="a)/ttomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄττομαι</orth>, <sense id="n17284.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διάζομαι</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
